summary: A Fox News broadcast clip of President Trump speaking from a podium at the White House surrounded by other people (construction workers, police), with Fox 'BREAKING NEWS' and 'FOX NEWS ALERT' lower-third captions about funding final sections of the border wall via the One Big Beautiful Bill. It is a recorded TV news segment with no music, narration overlay, or added editing.
notable_text: Fox News lower-thirds: 'THE WHITE HOUSE LIVE', 'BREAKING NEWS', 'TRUMP: FUNDING FINAL SECTIONS OF BORDER WALL', 'TRUMP: BILL IS MOST IMPORTANT BORDER LEGISLATION', 'FOX NEWS ALERT'.
